name: Towa Golf Club
address: 40 Buffalo Thunder Trail, Santa Fe, NM 87506
about:
Towa Golf Club is situated within the Hilton Santa Fe Buffalo Thunder resort in the Pojoaque Valley, featuring 27 holes of championship golf designed by Hale Irwin and William Phillips. The facility includes an indoor golf simulator available for guests and visitors, providing a high-tech alternative to outdoor play. The venue is known for its dramatic elevation changes, bent grass greens, and scenic mountain views. In addition to the simulator, the club offers a full-service golf shop, driving range, and professional instruction.

The indoor golf simulator features over 90 courses including Pebble Beach, Kapalua, Torrey Pines, and Royal Troon. It is available at a rate of $40 per hour for up to 5 guests. The facility also offers professional custom club fittings with a launch monitor, premium club rentals, and tournament services. The club is closed on Tuesdays year-round, with additional Thursday closures during winter months.

Towa Golf Club appeals to golfers of all skill levels, from beginners to low handicappers. The resort setting provides a comprehensive experience with multiple dining options, a casino, and accommodation on-site. The simulator serves as a complement to the outdoor courses, particularly useful during inclement weather or for focused practice sessions.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to over 90 world-famous courses including Pebble Beach and Royal Troon
Professional club fittings with launch monitor technology
Complement to 27-hole championship outdoor course with dramatic elevation changes
Resort amenities including restaurant, full bar, and casino nearby
Premium club rentals available for visitors

food_and_drink.notes: Restaurant available at the resort with six dining options on property
Full bar available at the golf facility and resort

simulator_hardware.notes: Indoor simulator with 90+ courses; specific hardware brand not disclosed

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, premium golf club rentals are available at the facility for those who do not have their own equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drink policy is not specified, but the venue has a restaurant and full bar on-site for guests.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: While not explicitly stated, expect approximately 1 hour per player for 18 holes. The simulator rents at $40 per hour for up to 5 guests.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, as part of a family-friendly resort with multiple activities, children are welcome at the facility.
